summary: Great sound‑board capture of a killer ’83 show, highlighted by an epic Other One and scorching Scarlet > Fire.
review: The second set bursts open with a fiery Scarlet > Fire followed by a soaring Space → The Other One that many reviewers call the centerpiece of the night.  Listeners rave about the clear, well‑balanced soundboard source, making this recording both musically and technically rewarding.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high reviewer stars (average 4.4) and glowing comments about the performance and soundboard quality push the rating into the good‑to‑great range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the source as "as good as any" and note very clear, well‑balanced sound with no reported dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set opens strong with Scarlet > Fire and a soaring Space → The Other One, creating an energetic high point; first set is mentioned only for lighting, not musical issues.
